prompt: I need to set up diagnostic labels for about 10,000 chest X-ray images. There are 5 diagnosis categories: Normal, Pneumonia, COVID-19, Tuberculosis, and Lung_Cancer. Multiple radiologists will be labeling the same images independently, and I need to track who labeled what. Some images will also have a confidence score from a model.

assertions.name: checks_existing_features
assertions.description: Should check existing features before creating
assertions.check: reads deriva://catalog/features or uses find_features or otherwise checks for existing features

assertions.name: creates_vocabulary_first
assertions.description: Should create a Diagnosis vocabulary with the 5 terms before creating the feature
assertions.check: calls create_vocabulary and add_term for all 5 categories before create_feature

assertions.name: creates_feature_with_terms
assertions.description: Should create a term-based feature on the Image table
assertions.check: calls create_feature with table_name=Image and terms parameter referencing the vocabulary

assertions.name: handles_multi_annotator
assertions.description: Should explain that features are multivalued and support multiple radiologists via separate executions
assertions.check: mentions that multiple annotators use separate executions and features track provenance

assertions.name: wraps_in_execution
assertions.description: Should add values within an execution for provenance

assertions.name: addresses_confidence_score
assertions.description: Should handle the model confidence score as metadata or a separate feature
assertions.check: discusses confidence as a metadata column on the feature or a separate feature for model predictions

assertions.name: distinguishes_human_vs_model
assertions.description: Should recognize that radiologist labels and model predictions are different annotation sources
assertions.check: discusses separate executions or workflows for human annotators vs model predictions
